qa_pairs.question: What are the storage characteristics, including quota and backup policy, for the $HOME directory on the TamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: On the TamIA cluster, the $HOME directory has a quota of 25 GB per user. It does not have an expiration time, is not backed up, and is accessible on both login and compute nodes.

qa_pairs.question: How are $SCRATCH quotas allocated to different user types on the TamIA cluster, and what are the general policies for this storage space?
qa_pairs.answer: On the TamIA cluster, $SCRATCH quotas vary by user type: CIFAR AI Chairs receive 2 TB, AI Institute Faculty Affiliates receive 1 TB, and both Faculty members within an AI program and those applying AI to other domains receive 500 GB each. This storage has a 2-month expiration time, is not backed up, and is available on both login and compute nodes.

qa_pairs.question: What are the project space quotas for different faculty roles on the TamIA cluster, and what are the general characteristics of this storage?
qa_pairs.answer: On the TamIA cluster, $PROJECT quotas are allocated based on faculty roles: CIFAR AI Chairs receive 5 TB, AI Institute Faculty Affiliates get 2 TB, and Faculty members (both within an AI program and applying AI to other domains) receive 500 GB each. This project space has no expiration time, is not backed up, and is accessible on both login and compute nodes.
